title: centaurium minutissimum
intro: Centaurium minutissimum, also known as the lesser centaury, is a small, annual or biennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Centaurium minutissimum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various ailments. Centaurium minutissimum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
